steps.t: Nargai has asked you to find and talk to Zogmauk in Kafagur. They suggested clearing your throat to alert him to your presence first.
You have caught Zogmauk's attention. You should talk to him in Kafagur.
Zogmauk has asked you to return to Nargai with some fruit and his apologies. Nargai can be found in Kafagur.
